programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep14
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep15
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep16
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep05
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep06
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep12
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep13
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep27
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep28
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: City of the City Ep09
programme.desc: A story of two generations navigating financial storms and ethical dilemmas in the cutthroat world of finance. From executives to employees, it explores moral choices amid money-driven ambitions.

programme.title: City of the City Ep10
programme.desc: A story of two generations navigating financial storms and ethical dilemmas in the cutthroat world of finance. From executives to employees, it explores moral choices amid money-driven ambitions.

programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep35
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.title: This Thriving Land Ep36
programme.desc: Portraying the rise and fall of the Ning, Feng & Fei families across two generations, as well as their entwined fates and enduring bonds forged by their struggle & love for the same land they call home.

programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep14
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: The Elephant Is Right Here Ep01
programme.desc: In the declining town of Xiangcheng, Zhang Kuang tries to borrow an elephant from his girlfriend's circus for a marathon but loses it, getting caught in a counterfeit money scheme.

programme.title: The Comic Bang Ep17
programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.desc: Adapted from the Japanese manga entitled "Monthly Girls' Nozaki-kun", this sweet romcom follows a girl who joins her crush's secret life as a shoujo artist after her confession goes hilariously wrong.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep07
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: For The Young Ones Ep08
programme.desc: Newly appointed Director of the Juvenile Prosecution, Lei Xu, join hands with juvenile prosecutor Du Zi Yu, clerk Yang Tian & bailiff Xu Zhang Li to uncover the truth behind each juvenile case.

programme.title: Drifting Away Ep14
programme.desc: Detective Peng Zhao Lin begins a ten-year hunt for four killers who evaded justice by laundering their identities. All while, he is relentlessly investigating a brutal dismemberment case.

programme.title: The Elephant Is Right Here Ep01
programme.desc: In the declining town of Xiangcheng, Zhang Kuang tries to borrow an elephant from his girlfriend's circus for a marathon but loses it, getting caught in a counterfeit money scheme.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep29
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: The Swimsuit Saga Ep30
programme.desc: A hilarious nude swim mishap unveils a rollercoaster tale of swimwear startups. A pact with a wealthy future father-in-law spawns a swimwear mogul.

programme.title: Blade Of Fury
programme.desc: Pei Xing is famous for being an 'unkillable' & cold-blooded assassin. But after witnessing great injustice, his dormant chivalry gradually awakens and he decides to retaliate in kind.

programme.title: Lost Destiny
programme.desc: While journeying to take the imperial exam, scholar Pu Song Ling meets Su Xian, a nine-tailed fox spirit indebted to his kindness in their previous life.

programme.title: Fox Demon Legend
programme.desc: Girls vanish in a remote village. Li Chang Xiao hunts for his missing disciple Luo Shui, uncovering fox legends, deadly secrets and a dark twisting conspiracy.

programme.title: Restart Tomorrow
programme.desc: Pei Hong Xiao is ordered to lead his teammates in a battle against dangerous mutant creatures while purifying the earth & searching for water contamination chips in the space station.

programme.title: Mi Wu Ci Sha
programme.desc: The daughter of a late great general embarks on a journey for revenge when she discovers that the mastermind to the murder of her biological father is her foster father, the Prime Minister.

programme.title: The Chi Dragon Slash
programme.desc: At the end of the Tang Dynasty, Navy General Qian Liu set off to exterminate the river pirates, only to discover a mystical two-headed beast called the Chi dragon in a cave.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep01
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: A Forbidden Marriage Ep02
programme.desc: Demon Sect's saintess Wang Yue is reborn after a near-death experience, becoming a humble orphan while holding onto her unfinished wish—to be with the righteous elder Yang Qing.

programme.title: The Drunken Prodigy
programme.desc: A spoiled young man with a passion for martial arts loses his entire fortune when he falls victim to a series of traps set by malicious gang while pursuing the top courtesan.

programme.title: Salt Lake Project
programme.desc: A fool searching for his missing lover unexpectedly encounters a rogue who has lost himself. With an old, broken truck, they embark on a journey filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Baoliezhuiji
programme.desc: Shang Xia is an honest, kind-hearted & funny chauffeur. But his friend, He Feng, is a lustful gambler who often gets into difficult situations that require Shang Xia to bail him out.

programme.title: Horror Legend Of Miao Ling
programme.desc: After the deaths of several people, allegedly from the Gu curse, Lu Wen Liang & Zhang Chi Yi venture into the secluded village in the mountains to uncover the truth.
